cues.text: 你好，小陳！最近過得怎麼樣？
cues.tr: Hello, Xiao Chen! How have you been?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我最近睡得不太好，除了這個其他都還好。你呢？
cues.tr: I haven't been sleeping well lately, but aside from that, everything's okay. How about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也不錯。我最近開始改變一些生活習慣。
cues.tr: I'm fine too. I have recently started to change some habits.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 真的嗎？你改變了哪些呢？
cues.tr: Really? What have you changed?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 比如每天早上六點起床去跑步。
cues.tr: For example, I got up at six o'clock in the morning and went for a run.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 早上跑步聽起來不錯啊。感覺如何？
cues.tr: Running in the morning sounds good. How do you feel?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 一開始有點累，不過現在感覺挺好的。
cues.tr: I was a little tired at first, but now I feel good.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我也想試試看。還有別的習慣嗎？
cues.tr: I'd like to try that too. Do you have any other habits?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我還開始每天喝八杯水。
cues.tr: I've also started drinking eight glasses of water a day.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 喝足夠的水很重要呢。你覺得有什麼變化嗎？
cues.tr: It's important to drink enough water. Do you think there are any changes?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 是啊，皮膚狀況改善了不少。
cues.tr: Yes, my skin condition has improved a lot.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我每天早上都起不來，你有什麼建議嗎？
cues.tr: I can't get up every morning, do you have any suggestions?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你可以晚上早點睡，不要太晚睡覺。
cues.tr: You can go to bed earlier at night, not too late to sleep.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 這個主意不錯，但是我總是很難早睡。
cues.tr: This is a good idea, but I always have a hard time going to bed early.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒關係，慢慢來，不要著急。
cues.tr: It's okay, take your time, don't be in a hurry.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 其實我最近也開始試著運動了。
cues.tr: In fact, I have recently started to try to exercise.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 感覺如何？
cues.tr: How do you feel?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還不錯。還有其他值得推薦的生活習慣嗎？
cues.tr: Not bad. Are there other recommended habits?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 比如多吃蔬菜水果，盡量少吃垃圾食物。
cues.tr: Such as eating more fruits and vegetables, eat as little as possible of junk food.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對呀，我以前經常吃垃圾食物。
cues.tr: Yes, I used to eat a lot of junk food.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 現在有改變嗎？
cues.tr: Have you changed?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是的，我已經不碰垃圾食物了。
cues.tr: Yes, I don't touch junk food anymore.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 太棒了！堅持下去，你一定會更健康的。
cues.tr: That's great! If you keep it up, you'll be healthier for sure.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 謝謝你的建議，我會繼續努力的。
cues.tr: Thank you for your advice, I will continue to work hard.
cues.speaker: B
